title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on peculiar places like a city where a zipline is required to commute, a town that is crawling with monkeys and a waterfall of blood.

title: The City of Ganpati
desc: A renowned mythology expert delves into the stories and legends surrounding Lord Ganesha, exploring his portrayal as the most beloved deity across various cultures in India.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: After Jenn attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer, the ride turns out to be little more than she bargained for.

title: Storage Wars
desc: After discovering a locker with potential, Rene steps over the opponents. Meanwhile, Kenny uses different tactics to boost his profit and Brandi struggles to find units that could be beneficial.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Out in Hesperia, California, when Mary faces transportation troubles, she decides to team up with Kenny and takes him out to pasture.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Meet an artist from Udupi who creates portraits out of Rubik's cubes. Also, explore a restaurant in New Delhi which is famous for its ten feet long dosa, capable of feeding eight people.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: At Clay Spencer Blacksmith shop, three skilled smiths face off in a heated competition. Subsequently, through gruelling challenges, they showcase their mastery of the forge.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Jenn's expensive shipment of prayer gongs almost misses its buyer and Jarrett's load is delayed by a day during a side job in Las Vegas.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

desc: After discovering a locker with potential, Rene steps over the opponents. Meanwhile, Kenny uses different tactics to boost his profit and Brandi struggles to find units that could be beneficial.

desc: Out in Hesperia, California, when Mary faces transportation troubles, she decides to team up with Kenny and takes him out to pasture.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host sheds light on Indian culture by travelling across the country to explore food, rituals, traditions and some rare talents.

title: Firepower: Defending India
desc: Take a look at how Indian troops brave icy weathers of the Siachen Glacier and how the Medical Corps evacuates an injured soldier.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny faces a heartfelt challenge as he restores an old pickup truck for a family honouring their mother's memory. Later, Danny discovers a rare Oldsmobile 442.

title: India: Marvels & Mysteries With William Dalrymple
desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

title: The Fast History Of
desc: The filmmaker delves into the history of a popular cookie-manufacturing company that overcame several obstacles to make a mark in the market.

title: Born to be Wild
desc: With just a horse and limited provisions, Andrew sets off on a perilous 600-kilometer journey through Australia's harsh terrains.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: The team are given to restore a 1940's carnival car. Later, a regular customer brings in a 1960's Schwinn bicycle to restore.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Four talented smiths are challenged to forge a chef's knife which is then tested by a culinary expert. Later, only two go ahead to participate in the next task.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Meet a chemistry professor who is known as the Plastic Man of India. Also venture into a salon in Mumbai who cuts hair by setting it on fire.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

title: Counting Cars
desc: A client comes at the shop to seek Danny's aid to restore a 1971 Road Runner, as a gift to his wife and step-daughter. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli settle old debts by gloving up and taking it to the mat.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Roads Unknown: India
desc: Jess and her crew navigate the stunning but rugged Konkan Coast, switching between bikes and boats. Later, they race toward Mumbai, determined to get Pulak to the city in time to visit his family.

title: India: Marvels & Mysteries With William Dalrymple
desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
desc: An armored car depot employee uses his insider knowledge to plan a heist that could earn him and his trusted friends more than $18 million in cash.
